name: ScIdsMadorCovLoad

text.value: WITH InputData AS (SELECT MBR_ID,SUB_ID,GRP_ID,PROD_ID,MBR_COV_EFF_DT,TAX_YR,SRC_SYS_CD,AS_OF_DTM,GRP_SK,MBR_MA_DOR_SK,MBR_SK,PROD_SK,SUB_SK,NON_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,HSA_ACCT_IN,ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,MBR_COV_TERM_DT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.X_TMP_ScIdsMadorCovLoad), CovInsert AS (SELECT MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK,MBR_ID,SUB_ID,GRP_ID,PROD_ID,MBR_COV_EFF_DT,TAX_YR,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,AS_OF_DTM,GRP_SK,MBR_MA_DOR_SK,MBR_SK,PROD_SK,SUB_SK,NON_CRBL_COV_CD_SK AS NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,HSA_ACCT_IN,ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,MBR_COV_TERM_DT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT FROM InputData), CovHistInsert AS (SELECT MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK,CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.AsOfDtm} AS datetime) AS AS_OF_DTM,MBR_ID,SUB_ID,GRP_ID,PROD_ID,MBR_COV_EFF_DT,TAX_YR,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GRP_SK,MBR_MA_DOR_SK,MBR_SK,PROD_SK,SUB_SK,NON_CRBL_COV_CD_SK AS NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,HSA_ACCT_IN,ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,MBR_COV_TERM_DT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT FROM InputData) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV AS T USING CovInsert AS S ON T.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK=S.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MBR_ID=S.MBR_ID,T.SUB_ID=S.SUB_ID,T.GRP_ID=S.GRP_ID,T.PROD_ID=S.PROD_ID,T.MBR_COV_EFF_DT=S.MBR_COV_EFF_DT,T.TAX_YR=S.TAX_YR,T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD,T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T.AS_OF_DTM=S.AS_OF_DTM,T.GRP_SK=S.GRP_SK,T.MBR_MA_DOR_SK=S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK,T.MBR_SK=S.MBR_SK,T.PROD_SK=S.PROD_SK,T.SUB_SK=S.SUB_SK,T.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK=S.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,T.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK=S.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,T.HSA_ACCT_IN=S.HSA_ACCT_IN,T.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN=S.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,T.MBR_COV_TERM_DT=S.MBR_COV_TERM_DT,T.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT=S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,T.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT=S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,T.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT=S.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,T.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT=S.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,T.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT=S.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,T.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT=S.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK,MBR_ID,SUB_ID,GRP_ID,PROD_ID,MBR_COV_EFF_DT,TAX_YR,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,AS_OF_DTM,GRP_SK,MBR_MA_DOR_SK,MBR_SK,PROD_SK,SUB_SK,NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,HSA_ACCT_IN,ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,MBR_COV_TERM_DT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT) VALUES(S.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK,S.MBR_ID,S.SUB_ID,S.GRP_ID,S.PROD_ID,S.MBR_COV_EFF_DT,S.TAX_YR,S.SRC_SYS_CD,S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.AS_OF_DTM,S.GRP_SK,S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK,S.MBR_SK,S.PROD_SK,S.SUB_SK,S.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,S.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,S.HSA_ACCT_IN,S.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,S.MBR_COV_TERM_DT,S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,S.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,S.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,S.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,S.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT); MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_HIST AS T USING CovHistInsert AS S ON T.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK=S.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK AND T.AS_OF_DTM=S.AS_OF_DTM WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MBR_ID=S.MBR_ID,T.SUB_ID=S.SUB_ID,T.GRP_ID=S.GRP_ID,T.PROD_ID=S.PROD_ID,T.MBR_COV_EFF_DT=S.MBR_COV_EFF_DT,T.TAX_YR=S.TAX_YR,T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD,T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T.GRP_SK=S.GRP_SK,T.MBR_MA_DOR_SK=S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK,T.MBR_SK=S.MBR_SK,T.PROD_SK=S.PROD_SK,T.SUB_SK=S.SUB_SK,T.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK=S.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,T.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK=S.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,T.HSA_ACCT_IN=S.HSA_ACCT_IN,T.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN=S.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,T.MBR_COV_TERM_DT=S.MBR_COV_TERM_DT,T.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT=S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,T.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT=S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,T.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT=S.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,T.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT=S.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,T.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT=S.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,T.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT=S.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK,AS_OF_DTM,MBR_ID,SUB_ID,GRP_ID,PROD_ID,MBR_COV_EFF_DT,TAX_YR,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GRP_SK,MBR_MA_DOR_SK,MBR_SK,PROD_SK,SUB_SK,NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,HSA_ACCT_IN,ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,MBR_COV_TERM_DT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT) VALUES(S.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_SK,S.AS_OF_DTM,S.MBR_ID,S.SUB_ID,S.GRP_ID,S.PROD_ID,S.MBR_COV_EFF_DT,S.TAX_YR,S.SRC_SYS_CD,S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.GRP_SK,S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK,S.MBR_SK,S.PROD_SK,S.SUB_SK,S.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_CD_SK,S.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD_SK,S.HSA_ACCT_IN,S.ON_EXCL_LIST_IN,S.MBR_COV_TERM_DT,S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,S.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,S.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT,S.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT,S.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT,S.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT);
